perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman walking through a busy night market. She is wearing a blue denim-style short-sleeved shirt over a white tank top. She looks towards the camera and begins speaking while walking forward. (2) As she moves, she uses various hand gestures, occasionally pointing to herself or gesturing outward to emphasize her speech. Her facial expressions are engaged and thoughtful. The background shows various street food stalls, neon signs, and people walking in the opposite direction. (3) She continues her walk, passing by a Samsung store and other street vendors. She holds a smartphone in her left hand during parts of the walk. The camera follows her movement at a consistent distance, capturing her from the waist up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a gentle, upbeat acoustic guitar melody playing as background music. A female voice is heard speaking clearly and calmly in Mandarin Chinese, sharing a personal narrative. (2) The acoustic music continues at a steady tempo throughout the speech. Ambient noise from the night market, including distant chatter and muffled street sounds, is audible but kept at a low volume to ensure the speaker's voice is prominent. (3) The speaker's tone remains consistent, friendly, and reflective until the video ends, with no significant changes in the soundscape or sudden sound effects.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 自己年輕的時候也是 (I was also like that when I was young) - Reflective tone. (2) 不懂得怎麼講 (Didn't know how to speak/express) - Explanatory tone. (3) 不管是你有困難 (No matter if you have difficulties) - Functional text. (4) 願意講出來的人是比較好的 (People who are willing to speak out are better) - Encouraging tone. (5) *無效抱怨 (Ineffective complaining) - Variety-show style label. (6) 但你抱怨事情不會解決 (But complaining won't solve things) - Logical/Advice tone. (7) *勇於開口 (Dare to speak up) - Hook/Call to action. (8) 一起變好的機會 (A chance to get better together) - Positive/Inspirational tone. (9) 懂的對事不對人 (Know how to focus on the matter, not the person) - Life lesson. (10) *放寬心接受批評 (Open your heart to accept criticism) - Variety-show style caption.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Personal Reflection -> Life Philosophy -> Encouragement

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, approximately 7 passers-by in the background of the night market.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue denim shirt over a white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Bustling night market street with bright neon signs for food stalls, a Samsung retail store, parked motorcycles, and various shops.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Artificial night lighting from shop signs and street lamps.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Personal Experience -> Moral/Lesson -> Practical Application
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide emotional value and career advice to viewers by sharing the creator's personal journey from being poor at communication to becoming resilient and open. It emphasizes that direct communication is more effective than complaining and that professional growth comes from being able to separate personal feelings from business matters.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video content is purely conversational and focused on personal philosophy without promoting a specific product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Walk-and-talk style vlog with direct camera address and life-coaching elements.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular short-form format in Taiwan where influencers share 'gold nugget' life advice while walking through relatable local settings like night markets.
